title: Jellyflow Runtime Public Surface v1
problem: Jellyflow runtime still exposes extraction-era compatibility layers and mixes canonical graph patches with XyFlow-shaped compatibility surfaces.

evidence.summary: Opened workstream and froze task ledger; no code gates run yet.
Removed runtime pass-through modules and updated imports to jellyflow_core. cargo check, runtime nextest, and external smoke passed.
Moved XyFlow-compatible changes, apply helpers, and callbacks under runtime::xyflow. cargo check and runtime-filtered nextest passed.
Split io/mod.rs into focused modules and removed Fret-era default path policy. cargo check, io-filtered nextest, external smoke, and Fret-path grep passed.
Split NodeGraphStore internals into private dispatch, events, subscriptions, and view modules while preserving the public facade. cargo check and runtime-filtered nextest passed.
Updated public docs, ran review/verification closeout, and passed fmt, workspace nextest, workspace clippy, dependency-boundary, and external-consumer smoke gates.

continue_policy.notes: This public-surface lane is closed. Start a new workstream for model-layer policy migration, geometry/spatial extraction, or downstream migration docs if needed.
